title: A Soul's Gaze

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A Dm Gm C7)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: To You, I lift my weary eyes,
Where heaven’s boundless mercy lies.
As servants look to hands that guide,
So do I wait, my soul abides.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: O let Your grace flow ever near,
For hearts are heavy, and hope unclear.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Our souls are worn, but still we pray, (still we pray)
Show us Your mercy, light our way. (light our way)
For scorn may pierce, and shadows stay, (shadows stay)
Yet faith endures in darkened day. (darkened day)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Too long we’ve borne the mocker’s jeer,
Their words like arrows, sharp and clear.
But patience stands, a steadfast guide,
Through storm and sorrow, undenied.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Our souls are worn, but still we pray, (still we pray)
Show us Your mercy, light our way. (light our way)
For scorn may pierce, and shadows stay, (shadows stay)
Yet faith endures in darkened day. (darkened day)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Even in silence, Your hand remains,
Through unseen trials, Your love sustains.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Our souls are worn, but still we pray, (still we pray)
Show us Your mercy, light our way. (light our way)
Through every trial, love’s refrain, (love’s refrain)
Our hope endures, our hearts remain. (hearts remain)

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A Dm Gm C7)
Faith endures… hearts remain… mercy sustains…

epigraph: as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters
styleNote: Full Instrumentation With Rich · Soulful Harmonies · Contrasting Mood
